story.title: Who I am
story.description: Your loved one's life story: what a new caregiver should know to care for them well.
story.sharedNotice: This page is shown to external caregivers through their link.
story.inspiration: Inspired by the Alzheimer's Society "This is me".
story.emptyHint: Start with the suggested sections, then adapt them freely.
story.sectionPlaceholder: A few simple sentences are enough...

emergency.title: Emergency sheet (fridge QR)
emergency.description: A QR code to print and stick on the fridge: emergency services scan it and see the vital sheet (treatments, allergies, contacts) without an account.
emergency.selfContainedNote: The sheet is contained in the QR code itself: it works from any phone (cellular), without exposing OpenCare on the internet and without any data stored online.
emergency.tooBig: The sheet is large: the QR may be hard to scan. Shorten the medical history or directives.
emergency.managedByFamily: The emergency sheet is managed by the family (administrator).
emergency.reprintNote: Reprint the poster after any change (medications, contacts...) so the QR stays up to date.
emergency.notesPlaceholder: Door code, pet, neighbour who has the key...

errors.load: Could not load the emergency sheet.
